security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
